hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty' | { read -r f; [ -n "$f" ] && npx prettier --write --ignore-unknown "$f" 2>/dev/null || true; }
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.(js|jsx|ts|tsx)$' && npx eslint --fix "$f" 2>/dev/null || true; }
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.(js|jsx|ts|tsx)$' && npm test --passWithNoTests 2>/dev/null || true; }

tmp=$(mktemp); cat > "$tmp"; cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""' < "$tmp"); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'npm (test|run test)'; then if git status --porcelain | grep -q .; then tp=$(jq -r '.transcript_path // ""' < "$tmp"); msg=""; if [ -n "$tp" ] && [ -f "$tp" ]; then raw=$(grep -a '"type":"user"' "$tp" | jq -r '.message.content | if type=="array" then (map(select(.type=="text")) | first | .text) else . end' 2>/dev/null | grep -v '^null$' | tail -1 | tr -s '
	 ' ' ' | sed 's/^ //;s/ $//'); if [ ${#raw} -gt 5 ] && ! echo "$raw" | grep -qiE '^(commit|fix|done|ok|yes|no|test|push|run|check)$'; then ctype="chore"; echo "$raw" | grep -qiE '(^fix|bug|error|crash)' && ctype="fix"; echo "$raw" | grep -qiE '(^add|^feat|^new |^creat|^implement)' && ctype="feat"; echo "$raw" | grep -qiE '(^remov|^delet|^clean|^drop)' && ctype="chore"; echo "$raw" | grep -qiE '(^updat|^adjust|^chang|^refactor|^renam|^replac|^mov)' && ctype="refactor"; echo "$raw" | grep -qiE '(^doc|^readme|^concept|^comment)' && ctype="docs"; echo "$raw" | grep -qiE '^test' && ctype="test"; clean=$(echo "$raw" | sed 's/[.!?]*$//'); subject=$(echo "${ctype}: ${clean}" | awk '{if(length>72){s=substr($0,1,72);sub(/ [^ ]*$/,"",s);print s}else print}'); msg="$subject"; fi; fi; if [ -z "$msg" ]; then files=$(git status --porcelain | awk '{print $NF}' | awk -F/ '{print $NF}' | sort -u | head -3 | tr '
' '|' | sed 's/|$//;s/|/, /g'); count=$(git status --porcelain | wc -l | xargs); [ "$count" -gt 3 ] && extra=" (+$((count-3)) more)" || extra=""; msg="chore: update ${files}${extra}"; fi; body=$(grep -a '"type":"assistant"' "$tp" | jq -r '.message.content | if type=="array" then (map(select(.type=="text")) | first | .text) else . end' 2>/dev/null | grep -v '^null$' | grep -v '^$' | awk 'length > 60' | tail -1 | sed 's/`//g;s/\*//g;s/^[#]* //' | tr -s '
	 ' ' ' | sed 's/^ //;s/ $//' | cut -c1-200); [ -z "$body" ] && body="Claude Code auto-commit"; git add -A && git commit -m "$msg" -m "$body" && printf '{"systemMessage":"✔ %s"}
' "$msg"; else echo '{"systemMessage":"✔ Tests passed — nothing to commit"}'; fi; fi; rm -f "$tmp"
